name: codex-workspace-sync
description: Sync Codex workspaces through GitHub remotes or portable snapshots.

interface.shortDescription: Sync Codex workspaces across computers with GitHub or snapshots.
interface.longDescription: Codex Workspace Sync helps Codex connect workspaces to one GitHub remote, commit and push local changes, pull and merge remote changes on other computers, and fall back to timestamped portable snapshots when Git is not the right fit.
capabilities: Commit, pull, merge, and push workspace changes
Create and restore portable workspace snapshots
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me sync this Codex workspace through GitHub.
